scripts.deps: npm install && cd client && npm install && cd ../server && pip install -r requirements.txt
scripts.dev: concurrently "cd client && npm run dev" "cd server && uvicorn main:app --reload"
scripts.git: git add . && git commit -m "update" && git push
scripts.deploy:client: cd client && npm run build && cd .. && firebase deploy
scripts.deploy: npm run deploy:server && npm run deploy:client
